content.text:
Verified. Query saved at `/app/solution.sparql`, executes clean on rdflib.

Results (3 full professors, EU-department + a dept with >10 currently-enrolled students as of 2025-08-16):
- Orfeas Menis | GR, US — ComputerScience_NTUA (12 enrolled)
- Pepe Attanasio | PT, GR — ComputerScience_NTUA
- Aristotle Tympas | GR — HistoryAndPhilosophy_NKUA (12 enrolled)

Excluded correctly: Voulodimos/Mueller (Assistant), John Smith (US-only), Marie Dubois (Sorbonne Math201 only 6 currently enrolled after graduations).

Logic: full = `STRSTARTS(role,"Professor")`; EU = 27-state alpha-2 IN-list; "currently enrolled" = enrollDate ≤ ref AND (no gradDate OR gradDate > 2025-08-16); `?countries` concats every worksIn country (incl. non-EU US).
